## Description of Feature

Please provide a description of the new feature you are adding, its architectural impact, and how it aligns with the project goals. Link to the feature request issue (e.g. `Resolves #123`).

## Design & UI Changes (if applicable)

Please attach screenshots, screen recordings, or mockups demonstrating the UI changes (e.g. comparing before/after or showing the new layout).

## Verification & Testing

Detail how you tested this new functionality:
- [ ] Tested on Android Emulator (API: ____)
- [ ] Tested on Physical Device (Device: ____)
- [ ] Verified Wear OS sync companion module (if applicable)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have added the standard GNU GPL v3.0 license header to all new source files
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or build errors
